a:r.a:t: 1. xxxx 2. xxxx 3. List footnotes in numerical order. Footnote numbers are not bracketed. Use 10pt font
Note: Do not put a period at the end of the note or the source
Source: Include a source for every chart that you use. Separate sources with a semicolon; BCG-related sources go at the end
